name: @tomehq/theme
description: Tome default theme and React app shell

scripts.build: tsdown src/index.tsx src/entry.tsx --format esm --dts --deps.never-bundle react --deps.never-bundle react-dom --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/config' --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/routes' --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/page-loader' --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/doc-context' --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/overrides' --deps.never-bundle '@tomehq/components'
scripts.dev: tsdown src/index.tsx src/entry.tsx --format esm --dts --deps.never-bundle react --deps.never-bundle react-dom --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/config' --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/routes' --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/page-loader' --deps.never-bundle 'virtual:tome/doc-context' --deps.never-bundle '@tomehq/components' --watch
